# Support

## Getting Help

### Bugs and Issues

If you've found a bug or have a feature request, please [open an issue](https://github.com/aaru-sh/bloomy-news/issues) on GitHub. Include:

- Your Python version (`python --version`)
- Your operating system
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- Any error output from the terminal

### Questions and Discussions

For general questions, usage help, or ideas, start a [Discussion](https://github.com/aaru-sh/bloomy-news/discussions) on GitHub.

### Security Issues

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue. Instead, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure instructions.

### Documentation

Browse the [docs/](../docs/) directory for detailed guides:

- [docs/NEWCOMERS.md](../docs/NEWCOMERS.md) — new to RSS, SQL, or APIs?
- [docs/CONFIGURATION.md](../docs/CONFIGURATION.md) — every option explained
- [docs/SCRAPERS.md](../docs/SCRAPERS.md) — adding custom scrapers
- [docs/CLASSIFIER.md](../docs/CLASSIFIER.md) — how classification works
- [docs/DEPLOYMENT.md](../docs/DEPLOYMENT.md) — scheduling and hosting
